name: Collection O near Museum Tsunami Banda Aceh formerly Blower Residence

hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 1.2 km from property

address.address1: Jalan Gunung Keumala No 2, Suka Ramai, Baiturrahman, Banda Aceh, Aceh, Sumatera, 23116, Indonesia

nearbyPlaces.name: Dr. Isra Firmansyah, Sp.A Spesialis Anak

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviews.hotelName: Collection O near Museum Tsunami Banda Aceh formerly Blower Residence

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Collection O near Museum Tsunami Banda Aceh formerly Blower Residence
comments.reviewComments: The staff is friendly and nice, the space is clean, and the living room is very comfortable to stay in. There is a TV that actually works, not just for decoration. Thank you, ma'am, who is taking care of us. 🥰
comments.originalComment:
stafnya ramah dan baik, ruang besrsih ada ruang tamu bersih , nyaman banget nginap di sini . ada tv yang bener” ada sinyal gak cuma untuk pajangan .
terimakasih ibuk yang jaga🥰

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewTitle: unable to check in and book another hotel

comments.reviewComments: Recomended untuk blower recident 👍👍, kamar bersih, pelayanan ramah, pokoknya mantap.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: fasilitas oke, harga oke, tempat oke

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Collection O near Museum Tsunami Banda Aceh formerly Blower Residence
comments.responseText:
Dear Guest,

Terima kasih atas rating sempurna dan ulasan positif Anda untuk Collection O Blower Residence Syariah. Kami senang mengetahui Anda merasa puas dengan lokasi yang strategis, suasana yang tenang, serta kenyamanan seperti di rumah selama menginap.

Apresiasi Anda sangat berarti bagi kami dan menjadi motivasi untuk terus menjaga kualitas pelayanan terbaik. Kami berharap dapat menyambut Anda kembali di kesempatan berikutnya.

Warm regards,
Liya
Collection O Blower Residence Syariah
comments.reviewComments: Lokasi strategis ditengah kota banda aceh, tempatnya tenang dan homey
